title: Nutrichef Double Burner Griddle Pan, Non-Stick Griddle for Stove Top, 50.8 x 30.5 x 2 cm, Even Heat, Bakelite Handles, Dishwasher Safe, PFOA & PFOS Free, Cast Iron Style Cooking Grill Plate
features: NON-STICK GRIDDLE PAN FOR STOVE TOP: Features a marble-coated surface for easy food release and hassle-free cooking without sticking. Designed for use on gas stoves and other common cooktops
COMPATIBLE WITH MULTIPLE COOKTOPS: Works with gas, ceramic, glass, and halogen hobs for versatile indoor cooking. Doubles as a comal for tortillas or a flat cast iron grill plate for all-day meals
EASY-GRIP HEAT-RESISTANT HANDLES: Equipped with heatproof Bakelite handles for safe handling and full control. Covers two burners to provide more space for family-sized dishes and batch cooking
SIMPLE TO CLEAN WITH DISHWASHER SAFETY: Non-stick surface allows quick food release and fast cleanup after meals. Dishwasher safe with drip-free pouring edges to minimise mess and splatter
DURABLE DESIGN WITH EVEN HEAT DISTRIBUTION: Withstands heat up to 260°C for consistent cooking results every time. Built from warp-proof materials for long-lasting use and even cooking performance
description: Introducing the Non-Stick Double Burner Griddle, Dishwasher Safe with Bakelite Handle (Black) your new kitchen essential for effortless, even cooking. Designed to cover two stovetop burners at once, this durable griddle is perfect for whipping up large meals with ease. Made from reinforced pressed aluminum, it effectively distributes and retains heat, ensuring your food is cooked evenly every time. The superior marble non-stick coating interior allows for cooking without the hassle of stuck-on messes, making clean-up quick and easy. This griddle is compatible with gas, ceramic, glass, and halogen cooktops, offering versatility in any kitchen. The comfortable, heatproof Bakelite handles provide a secure grip, while the drip-free pouring and sloped sides make cooking and serving a breeze. Built to withstand high temperatures up to 500°F, this stovetop griddle is warp-proof, corrosion-resistant, and designed to last. Plus, it’s food-grade safe, environmentally friendly, and free from harmful chemicals like PFOA and PFOS. Whether you're making pancakes, grilling sandwiches, or searing meats, this double burner griddle is the perfect tool for all your cooking needs.
